程序包 edu.bupt.ta.model

类 SystemLog

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.model.SystemLog
public class SystemLog extends Object
Represents an entry in the system audit log. Each log record captures who performed an action, what type of action it was, on which entity, and when and from which IP address it occurred. Maps to the system_logs.csv file via LogService.

    • getCreatedAtText

      public String getCreatedAtText()
      Returns the creation timestamp formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".
      返回:
      formatted timestamp string, or empty string if createdAt is null

    • getOperationTypeLabel

      public String getOperationTypeLabel()
      Returns a human-readable label for the operation type, in lowercase (e.g., "create", "approve", "login"). Returns "unknown" if operationType is null.
      返回:
      a lowercase label or "unknown"
